query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, up.userId, up.firstName, up.onboardingCompleted, LENGTH(up.onboardingData) as dataLength FROM users u LEFT JOIN userProfiles up ON u.id = up.userId ORDER BY u.id DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user uKNVFKSibJwkJmH.a22a0ae33adf --database 8mnpBTn4hjcJVry2wKetBn --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, up.userId, up.firstName, up.onboardingCompleted, LENGTH(up.onboardingData) as dataLength FROM users u LEFT JOIN userProfiles up ON u.id = up.userId ORDER BY u.id DESC LIMIT 5;
